description: Single-crate Rust project with two planted defects, hermetic run (no external crates, so no cargo fetch under --network none). First e2e for the rust install-stage toolchain: proves the qodana-rust image builds (base + rust-toolchain + dist + cli + runtime), loads its Ultimate RustRover profile, and scans a real .rs producing SARIF. Driver name + rule ids are NEEDS-PINNING starting guesses — pin from a CI control run and confirm both are enabled in THIS image's default RR (RustRover) profile.

expectations.reason: STARTING-GUESS id: the planted `use std::fmt::Write;` that is never used must surface as an unused-import inspection; pin the exact id from a CI control run and confirm it is in the Ultimate RustRover profile.

STARTING-GUESS id: the planted non-snake-case binding `let MyValue = 42` must surface as a naming-convention inspection; pin the exact id from a CI control run and confirm it is in the Ultimate RustRover profile.
